passive.name: Headshot
passive.description: Every few basic attacks, or against a target she has trapped or netted, Caitlyn will fire a headshot dealing bonus damage that scales with her critical strike chance. On trapped or netted targets, Caitlyn's Headshot attack range is doubled.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Caitlyn}} basic attacks generate stacks of ''Count''. At maximum stacks, her next {{tip|basic attack}} will fire a ''Headshot'' dealing {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} that scales with her {{sti|{{as|critical strike chance}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: On {{ai|Yordle Snap Trap|Caitlyn|trapped}} or {{ai|90 Caliber Net|Caitlyn|netted}} targets, she gains another ''Headshot'' at extra {{sti|range|attack range}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Caitlyn's''' basic attacks generate a [[stack]] of ''Count'' {{tip|on-attack}}, doubled if she is within {{tip|brush}}. At 5 stacks, or 4 while in ''brush'', her next [[basic attack]] consumes all stacks {{tip|on-attack}} to become a ''Headshot''.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Headshot:}} '''Caitlyn's''' basic attack is empowered to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}} and deal {{as|{{pp|key=%|60 to 120 for 3|1 to 13}}|ad}} {{as|(+ {{tt|{{critical damage|{{ccd|Caitlyn|crit_base}}|100|mod=0.85}}|(100% total critical damage x 85% critical strike chance)}} critical strike chance)|critical chance}} {{as|AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, increased to {{as|{{pp|key=%|110 to 120 for 3|1 to 13}}|AD}} {{as|(+ {{tt|{{critical damage|{{ccd|Caitlyn|crit_base}}|100|mod=0.85}}|(100% total critical damage x 85% critical strike chance)}} critical strike chance)|critical chance)}} {{as|AD}} against non-champions.
wiki_detail.description3: Enemies that step over a ''{{ai|Yordle Snap Trap|Caitlyn}}'' or are hit by ''{{ai|90 Caliber Net|Caitlyn}}'' can grant an additional ''Headshot'' against them at {{sti|range|1300 range}} within {{fd|1.8}} seconds, without consuming stacks. Each method grants only one ''Headshot'' at a time.
wiki_detail.notes:
* If '''Caitlyn's''' current target becomes trapped by {{ai|Yordle Snap Trap|Caitlyn}} or {{ai|90 Caliber Net|Caitlyn}} while her attack is on cooldown, this ongoing cooldown will be refunded partially so that her next attack on them can begin earlier.
** Swapping the target to an enemy trapped by {{ai|Yordle Snap Trap|Caitlyn}} or {{ai|90 Caliber Net|Caitlyn}} also reduces her ongoing attack cooldown.
*** {{pending for test}}: The exact attack cooldown refund appears to be 50% of the attack cooldown at current attack speed, but at a minimum amount it lets '''Caitlyn''' start the attack against the trapped target within {{fd|0.5}} seconds of her previous attack windup completing.
* The bonus range from {{ii|Rapid Firecannon}} will not have any effect during {{ai|Yordle Snap Trap|Caitlyn|trap}} and {{ai|90 Caliber Net|Caitlyn|net}} extended ''Headshot'' attacks.
* Only the ordinary {{as|100% attack damage}} portion of the attack can critically strike. The bonus from ''Headshot'' is added after the critical strike is rolled.
** The full damage of ''Headshot'' applies {{stil|life steal}}.
** ''Headshot'' is a single instance of damage, thus does not trigger {{cais|Tantrum|Amumu}} or {{ii|Warden's Mail}} passives twice.
* The basic attack triggering ''Headshot'' can {{tip|critically strike}}, but ''Headshot's'' damage remains unchanged if it does.
* Since '''Caitlyn's''' Art and Sustainability Update, Ability-granted ''Headshots'' are the same as the original ''Headshot'' override attack, though what lets them cast at high range is still relatively special. They trigger [[on-attack]] effects (including stacking ''Headshot'').
** {{Pending for test}} {{iis|Runaan's Hurricane}} {{nie|Wind's Fury}}, is special cased to search targets with the increased range as well.
* Because ''Headshot'' stacks are generated [[on-attack]], {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}} bolts will not generate stacks towards ''Headshot''.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[ward]]s.
** Stacks will still be generated towards ''Headshot'' when attacking them.

Q.name: Piltover Peacemaker
Q.description: Caitlyn revs up her rifle for 1 second to unleash a penetrating shot that deals physical damage (deals less damage to subsequent targets).
Q.tooltip:
Caitlyn revs her rifle to fire a piercing shot dealing {{ initialdamage }} physical damage. After the bolt strikes the first target, it opens into a wider shot that deals {{ secondarydamage }} physical damage.

Enemies revealed by Yordle Snap Trap always take full damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Caitlyn}} revs up her rifle to unleash a penetrating shot that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The projectile expands after the first target but also deals less damage.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Caitlyn''' fires a piercing shot in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy it passes through, after which it expands in width but deals only 50% damage to enemies it hits thereafter.
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies {{tip|true sight|revealed}} by ''{{ai|Yordle Snap Trap|Caitlyn}}'' always take {{ccs|full damage|physical}} from ''Piltover Peacemaker''.
wiki_detail.notes:
* Enemies hit while protected by a {{tip|spell shield}} will still be considered a target for calculating damage for subsequent hits.
{{Effect at cast time start}}

W.name: Yordle Snap Trap
W.description: Caitlyn sets a trap that, when sprung, reveals and immobilizes the enemy champion for 1.5 seconds, granting Caitlyn an empowered Headshot.
W.tooltip:
Caitlyn sets a trap that Roots the first champion that steps on it for {{ rootduration }} seconds and granting True Sight of them for 3 seconds. Traps last for {{ trapduration }} seconds, and {{ maximumtraps }} traps may be active at once. This Ability has {{ maximumcharges }} charges ({{ ammorechargetime }} second refresh).

Targets rooted by this Ability take an additional {{ headshotbonusdamage }} physical damage from Headshot.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

label: Bonus Headshot Damage on Trapped Targets
Recharge Time
Maximum Traps
Trap Duration

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Caitlyn}} sets a trap at the target location that lasts for a while. The trap springs when an enemy champion steps on it, {{tip|true sight|revealing}} and {{tip|root|rooting}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Caitlyn''' periodically [[ammunition|stocks]] a charge of ''Yordle Snap Trap'', up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb3: The next ''{{ai|Headshot|Caitlyn}}'' against a trapped target will deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Caitlyn''' sets a visible trap at the target location that is {{tip|untargetable}} and arms after 1 second, lasting for a duration. The trap grants {{tip|sight}} of the area for 1 second after being placed.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Caitlyn''' periodically [[ammunition|stocks]] a ''Yordle Snap Trap'' charge, up to a maximum amount. Deploying traps beyond the maximum destroys the oldest one.
wiki_detail.description3: The next enemy champion that springs the trap is {{tip|root|rooted}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds and {{tip|true sight|revealed}} for 3 seconds, as well as takes additional damage from the ''{{ai|Headshot|Caitlyn}}'' granted by this ability. Trapped targets become immune to further ''Yordle Snap Traps'' for 3 seconds, preventing them from springing subsequent traps for the duration.
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{pending for test|Immunity vs {{tip|Airborne}} moveblocks and {{tip|Kinematics}}?}}
* Multiple armed traps on the same location will spring all at once if an enemy steps on one of them.

E.name: 90 Caliber Net
E.description: Caitlyn fires a heavy net to slow her target. The recoil knocks Caitlyn back.
E.tooltip: Caitlyn fires a net, pushing her backwards. The net Slows the first target hit by {{ e3 }}% for {{ e2 }} second and deals {{ netdamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Caitlyn}} fires a heavy net that {{tip|slow|slows}} the first target hit and deals {{as|magic damage}} to them.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Firing the net causes her to {{tip|dash|recoil}} back.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Caitlyn''' fires a net in the target direction and {{tip|dash|recoils}} 390 units in the opposite direction. The net deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 50% for 1 second.
wiki_detail.description2: '''''Caitlyn''' will not dash backwards if she is {{tip|immobilize|immobilized}} or {{tip|ground|grounded}} during the cast time. She can cast any of her [[champion ability|abilities]] during the dash.''

R.name: Ace in the Hole
R.description: Caitlyn takes time to line up the perfect shot, dealing massive damage to a single target at a huge range. Enemy champions can intercept the bullet for their ally.
R.tooltip:
Caitlyn takes a moment to channel and line up the perfect shot, then she fires, dealing {{ rtotaldamage }} physical damage, but other enemy champions can intercept it. This Ability grants True Sight of the target during the channel.

Damage scales with Caitlyn's Critical Strike chance and Critical Strike Damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Caitlyn}} targets an enemy champion and takes time to line up the perfect shot, dealing massive {{as|physical damage}} to them at a huge range.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The target's allied {{tip|champions}} can intercept the shot for them.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Caitlyn''' locks onto the target enemy champion and {{tip|channel|channels}} for 1 second, {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them as well as {{tip|sight|revealing}} herself.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Ace in the Hole'' is placed on a 5-second {{sti|cooldown}} if canceled.
wiki_detail.description3: Once '''Caitlyn''' completes the channel, she fires a homing bullet toward the target that deals {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy champion it hits, increased by {{pp|0 to 50 for 11|key=%|0 to 100|key1=%|type=critical strike chance|color=critical strike chance}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The following will cancel ''Ace in the Hole's'' channel (mana expenditure is not compensated):
** '''Caitlyn''' is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}.
** The target becomes {{tip|untargetable}}.
** '''Caitlyn''' or her target {{tip|death|dies}}.
* ''Ace in the Hole'' reveals the target and '''Caitlyn''' through a buff that lasts for up to 4 seconds.
** The buff is applied to the target from the start of the cast time.
** The buff ends prematurely when the channel is canceled or the bullet hits an enemy.
*** The target is revealed for 1 second if the buff is ended prematurely.
*** It is not removed if the cast time is cancelled or the bullet missile is destroyed.{{bug|2}}
* The ability also goes on a 5-second {{sti|cooldown}} if '''Caitlyn''' enters {{tip|resurrection}} during the cast time.
** The cast time does not end prematurely but the channel will be immediately canceled the moment the cast time completes.
* If the target dies after the bullet has been fired, the shot will continue towards their corpse and may still hit other enemy champions.
* The bullet has a {{tip|sight}} radius of 1500 attached to it.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}** This excludes losing sight of the target.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Caitlyn''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
